rule: hit = (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7); independent scoring per result; threshold_for_fail=1
candidate_summary: CURLING-SWEEP entropy-triggered dynamic per-token precision-window switch for transient fp8 in FFN layers. Monitors per-step smoothness signal (output logit entropy / top-1 prob); on high confidence sweeps next k tokens to fp8 in FFN, reverts to fp16 on rising uncertainty. Combines (i) per-step smoothness signal + (ii) dynamic look-ahead window of lower precision + (iii) per-token reversible switch.

results_analysis.title: QuickSilver Dynamic Token-Level Inference (2026/05)
results_analysis.note: EXACT TWIN — entropy-based per-token bit-width assignment reducing compute on low-entropy spans is the same mechanism.

results_analysis.title: Don't Waste Bits! Adaptive KV-Cache Quantization (2026/04)
results_analysis.note: Adaptive KV-cache quantization driven by entropy-based uncertainty per token — same entropy-triggered precision switch.

results_analysis.title: QTALE: Quantization-Robust Token-Adaptive Layer Execution (2026/02)
results_analysis.note: Token-adaptive layer execution combined with quantization and entropy regularization.

results_analysis.title: Token-Level Entropy Gating overview
results_analysis.note: Token-level entropy gating modulating inference per token — the signal pattern is identical.

results_analysis.title: Progressive Mixed-Precision Decoding (ICLR 2026)
results_analysis.note: Phase-aware mixed-precision decoding with precision varying across tokens — same broad mechanism family even if scheduling differs.

results_analysis.title: Cache Me If You Must: Adaptive KV Quantization (ICML 2025)
results_analysis.note: Adaptive KV quantization based on access patterns; kw>=2 and sem>=0.7 — counted as hit.

results_analysis.title: 33% faster LLM inference with FP8 quantization
results_analysis.note: Static FP8; no per-token entropy trigger; below all thresholds.

verdict_sentence: CURLING-SWEEP fails novelty: 6 of 8 retrieved results hit on at least one channel (5 functional hits, including QuickSilver as an exact twin at func=0.95 and Don't Waste Bits at func=0.90), with kw>=2 and sem>=0.7 also met on multiple results, far exceeding the threshold_for_fail=1.
